author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(dependencies): update algoliasearch-helper (algolia/react-instantsearch#3176)
body:
* feat(dependencies): update algoliasearch-helper

- fix (unlikely) source of prototype pollution if arbitrary search parameters are user controlled
- improve cache hit-rate if using the parameter "facets" with the value "*"

* less change, better TS
